pfs.note: Items with effects that have an undetermined duration, end their effects at the end of a scenario or adventure unless specifically stated otherwise by the campaign rules.

stat_block.text: This thick book has several colorful bookmarks and page dividers. Its title and text shift between numerous languages.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

variants.name: Linguist's Dictionary (Greater)
variants.text: The dictionary can hold three languages at a time.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: The grimoire absorbs knowledge of one language translated this way (caster’s choice if more than one), allowing its bearer to communicate on a rudimentary level in that language even after the spell’s duration has elapsed. The *linguist’s dictionary* can hold one language at a time.
abilities.requirement: Your last action was to cast a spell prepared from this grimoire that allows understanding of another language, such as *translate* or *truespeech*

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.
